citation: Heydari, M., Cwitkowitz, F. and Duan, Z. (2021). BeatNet: CRNN and Particle Filtering for Online Joint Beat Downbeat and Meter Tracking. Proc. 22nd ISMIR Conference.
notes: BeatNet preprocessing discrepancy — paper text vs official implementation: paper text states 93ms window / 46ms hop (~22fps). Official BeatNet GitHub and all published experiments use win=1408 samples (64ms) / hop=441 samples (20ms) = 50fps. We follow the official implementation (50fps) to match published numbers.

Architecture: 1D Conv (2 filters, kernel 10) + MaxPool/2 + FC-150 + 2x unidirectional LSTM (150 units) + FC-3 + softmax. Training: Adam lr=5e-4, batch=200, 8-sec segments, weighted CE (inverse class freq). Early stop patience=20 (Heydari et al. 2021 Section 3.2).
Requires datasets: ballroom, beatles, gtzan, hainsworth, smc, simac under MIR_DATA_ROOT.
